CreatorIQ

Live Dashboard Walkthrough — 9 Screens  ·  creatoriq.streamlit.app

Output & Screens
1
Sidebar — Creator Selection & Navigation
Always visible · Left panel on every page
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • 8-page navigation menu — Creator section with all pages listed
  • Paste any YouTube channel URL to analyse a new creator
  • Or pick from 59 pre-loaded creators in the dropdown
  • Sidebar state persists across page navigation
Entry point to the full dashboard
2
Overview — Channel Snapshot & Full Video Table
Overview · Auto-loads when creator is selected
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • Subscribers, total views, upload frequency, avg video length
  • Full sortable video table: Views, Likes, Comments, Engagement %, CTR, Watch %, Est. Revenue $*
  • Revenue caption: estimated from public view data and industry CPM benchmarks — not actual earnings
  • Title column redacted for privacy
views_per_day not raw view_count — no age bias
3
Performance — Deep-Dive Analytics
Performance · Views/day trend + Top 5 + Duration buckets
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • Avg views, engagement rate, view trend metrics at a glance
  • Performance by category table — niche and video count
  • Top 5 videos by views (titles redacted) with engagement and est. revenue
  • Performance by video duration bucket (short / mid / long)
All metrics from public YouTube Data API v3
4
Audience — Comment Sentiment Analysis
Audience · VADER sentiment on real YouTube comments
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • Loyal Commenters count, Avg Sentiment score, Sentiment label, Long-term Fans
  • Contextual insight: channel vs niche average sentiment delta
  • Sentiment Distribution bar chart (positive / neutral / negative)
  • Top Comment Topics table — themes surfaced from real comments
Sentiment scored via VADER, no individual commenters exposed
5
SEO & Timing — Keyword + Posting Intelligence
SEO & Timing · Generated in weekly reports only
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • Top channel keywords as badge pills
  • Empirically best posting day and hours (UTC) — from actual views/day, not guesses
  • Title metadata stats: avg length, % with numbers, % with brackets/parens
  • Detailed metrics clearly readable — no sensitive data on this page
SEO agent only activates for weekly reports
6
Predict Views — Forward-Looking Forecast
Predict Views · Input planned video → instant prediction
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • Form: planned title, category, tags, posting day, duration slider
  • Predicted views, confidence range, predicted likes, estimated revenue
  • Multiplier breakdown: day-of-week, category, duration, keyword signals
  • Specific ranked recommendations from the prediction model
RAG (ChromaDB) + Pearson correlation engine
7
Originality Scorer — Uniqueness vs 59 Creators
Originality Scorer · Batch score or score a planned video
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • "Score all videos" button — runs every video against the full 59-creator corpus
  • Planned video form: enter title + description before filming
  • Scores: Originality, Freshness, Overall (1.0 = completely unique)
  • Most similar existing video from any other creator + clickable YouTube link
sentence-transformers all-MiniLM-L6-v2 + ChromaDB
8
Comparisons — Peer Benchmarking
Comparisons · Niche peers + closest by subscriber count
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • Top 10 videos in same category ranked by views/day (titles + creators redacted)
  • Your avg views/day vs niche average with % delta shown
  • Your best single video views/day vs niche
  • 3 closest creators by subscriber count with side-by-side metrics
Sorted by closest subscriber count — primary benchmark view
9
This Week — AI-Generated Brief
📋 This Week · Cadence-aware — velocity / daily / weekly
creatoriq.streamlit.app

What this screen shows

  • Report type determined by scheduler (never hardcoded)
  • Narrative brief written by Claude Sonnet 3.5 with ranked action items
  • Comparison view included in weekly reports — peer data for context
  • LLM Judge scores brief on 5 quality dimensions after generation
Core deliverable — the full AI intelligence brief
